keyFeatures.en: Split, merge, and reorder pages in PDFs
keyFeatures.zh: 分割、合并和重新排列PDF中的页面

keyFeatures.en: Extract text and images from PDFs

weaknesses.en: Limited to personal use and lacks advanced features
weaknesses.zh: 仅限个人使用且缺乏高级功能

weaknesses.en: No clear pricing for business or enterprise users
weaknesses.zh: 未明确针对企业和商业用户的定价

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small teams for personal projects
targetAudience.zh: 个人和小团队用于个人项目

positioning.en: A simple and free tool for basic PDF manipulation
positioning.zh: 一个简单且免费的基本PDF操作工具
